numeric_id_in_path.reason: Numeric ID directly in path — classic IDOR surface

uuid_in_path.reason: UUID in path — may be guessable or enumerable via other leaks

id_query_param.reason: Direct object reference via query parameter

action_with_numeric_id.reason: Action endpoint with sequential numeric ID — enumerable

nested_resource_id.reason: Nested resource — horizontal privilege escalation risk

base64_id_param.reason: Possible base64-encoded object reference — obscured but not protected

hash_id_param.reason: Possible MongoDB ObjectId or hash-based ID

idor_template_literal.reason: Template literal building URL with object reference — definite IDOR surface
